dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.intro: Overview page showing key metrics and insights.

study_stats.title: Study Dashboard
study_stats.hero_description: Track focus, weekly volume, and discipline distribution.
study_stats.telemetry_disabled: Your in-app usage metrics are disabled in Settings. The dashboard still shows study entries, but journey indicators remain hidden.

ai_tip.label: AI Tip:
ai_tip.empty: No recent topics studied. Resume your studies to build discipline and earn points!
ai_tip.good: Your dedication to {{topic}} is great. Keep your {{score}} Transformation points up and try not to overload!
ai_tip.no_telemetry: Your recent focus is being driven by {{topic}}. Turn app telemetry on to pair that progress with journey and retention indicators.

study_stats.empty: You have no study logs yet. Start logging to get insights!

analytics_page.title: Usage Dashboard
analytics_page.subtitle: Track the global evolution of our community and your personal progress.
analytics_page.mockup_warning: ⚠️ Mockup Warning: This is an illustrative demonstration. Since the app runs 100% on your device (no backend), these global data are simulated. In the future, they will represent the real community.

alerts.api_key: Set your Gemini API key in Settings (or chat) before continuing.
alerts.insufficient_data: Not enough data to generate the analysis yet. Try using the journal or study tools more often.
alerts.connection_failed: Could not reach the AI for meta-analysis.
alerts.telemetry_disabled: Personal telemetry disabled. Analytics recording is off in Settings. Enable it to unlock interactive charts for tracking your learning journey.

charts.empty_personal: There isn't enough data yet to plot your usage. Try interacting more with the app.

meta_analysis.title: Meta Mode: Pattern Analysis (AI)
meta_analysis.description: Let artificial intelligence passively review crossovers between your focus, moods, and sessions to give you active tips.

emotional_journal.title: Emotional Repertoire
emotional_journal.subtitle: Expand your emotional vocabulary. The more you name what you feel, the easier it is to communicate and connect.
emotional_journal.empty: No record found. Start your emotional journal!

questions.proud: When did you feel good about yourself?
